arts.ttl: Fagioli Bids Farewell to Juventus : A Heartfelt Goodbye
arts.sum: Nicolò Fagioli has officially become a Fiorentina player, marking the end of his 11-year journey with Juventus. The midfielder’s transfer was finalized in the closing hours of the transfer window, with Fiorentina securing his services ahead of Marseille. The deal structure includes an initial loan fee of 2.5 million euros, with an obligation to buy set at 13.5 million euros plus potential bonuses of 2.5 million euros. Fagioli, born in 2001, joined Juventus’ youth academy eleven years ago, with his only stint away from the club being a loan spell at Cremonese during the 2021/22 season.
